productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Small Brown Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros handbag collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bag is spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets that allow you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised.
